name: Easy Frosty Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
FILLING
1 can Pumpkin (16 oz.)
1 pint Vanilla ice cream, softened
2 cups
1 cup Powdered sugar
1 1/2 teaspoons Pumpkin pie spice
1/8 teaspoon Salt
1 tablespoon Vanilla
2 cups Frozen whipped topping, thawed
CRUST:
Melt margarine in a small saucepan. Remove from heat; stir in crushed cookies. Press mixture evenly in the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate.
FILLING:
In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients except whipped topping; blend until smooth. Fold whipped topping into pumpkin mixture. Pour into prepared pie crust. Freeze for several hours or until firm. (For longer storage, cover tightly with foil.) Before serving, let stand at room temperature at least 15 minutes. Garnish as desired.
